subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of His friends with utmost grace and loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلى دوستان خود را بکمال عنایت و شفقت ذکر میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @goodly deeds; actions, @unity; oneness of humanity, @growth of the Cause
